failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
WHERE p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant & open & Wednesday')
ORDER BY p.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
WHERE p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant | food | dining')
AND (p.description ILIKE '%Wednesday%' OR p.description ILIKE '%open%')
ORDER BY p.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.
